titleStmt.title: SII 22.197: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 197. (A.R. No. 197 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, GRĀMAM. ŚIVALŌKANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE WEST AND SOUTH WALLS OF THE SAME SHRINE. JAṬ. SUNDARA-PĀṆḌYA I—15th YEAR (A.D. 1265-66).

summary.p: This also begins with the praśasti Samasta-jagad-ādhāra etc. It is damaged in places. The inscription records (another) endowment by the king of 9(1/2) vēli of land, free of all taxes, for the expenses of the service instituted in the temple in the name of the ruling king by Vīra-Pāṇḍya. Reference is made to some lands granted in the time of Kōpperuñjiṅgadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ . svasti samastajagatādhāra somakulatilaka madhurāpurimādhava keraḷa vamśa nirmmūlana laṅkā dvipa viluṇṭha na
[dvitiyarāma] coḷakulaśailaku karikūṭapākala vividha
hariṇaśārdūla
tiṣṭhāpa parameśvara śrī sundarapāṇḍyadeva kolcaṭaipaṉmar tirupuvaṉaccakkaravartti śrī cuntarapā
ṇṭiyadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 5vatu tribhuvanaccakravartti koṉerimel koṇṭāṉ naṭuvilmaṇṭalattu kirāmattil ciyāṟṟut
taḷi ci mulattāṉamuṭaiya pokkaṇaṅ kuṭuttaruḷiya nāyaṉār koyilt tāṉattār Innāyaṉārkku virapāṇṭiyatevan
nam perāl kaṭṭina cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ sandhikkum tirunāḷukkum Ivvūril kopperuñciṅkar nāḷil paḻaṅkuṭippa
ṟṟu niṅkalāṉa nilattil Innāyaṉārkku tirunāmattukkāṇi Iṟai yiliyāka viṭṭa viḷainilam Eḻuveliyum
Oṉpataraiyum
ṭamai poṉvari viṉiyokamuḷḷiṭṭa Aṉaittāyavaṟkkamum Uṭpaṭa patiṉaiñcāvatu
tirunāmattukkāṇi Iṟaiyiliyāka tantom Ippaṭikku candrādityavat celvatāka kallilum cempilu
m veṭṭi Aṉupavikka Ippaṭi colluvatāka paṇippāraip potak kāṭṭac coṉṉom Ivai vikkiramapā
ṇṭiya vāṇātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu 10 5vatu ḷa 100 5 10 5 Ivai toṇṭaimāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaḻutiyata
raiyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.197 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
